processSteps.title: Tell Us
processSteps.description: You tell us what you've got or what you need. No complicated forms, just the basics.

processSteps.title: Review
processSteps.description: We review it, position it correctly, and identify where it fits in the market.

processSteps.title: Connect
processSteps.description: We connect the right buyers and sellers, not everyone, just the ones who matter.

processSteps.title: Negotiation
processSteps.description: We handle the back-and-forth around pricing, questions, negotiation, and documentation.

processSteps.title: Deal Done
processSteps.description: Equipment moves, paperwork clears, and everyone moves on.

whyPeopleWorkWithPetra.title: We understand field reality
whyPeopleWorkWithPetra.description: We're not guessing what a compressor package is or how it's used. We know how it actually runs in the field.

whyPeopleWorkWithPetra.title: We keep deals moving
whyPeopleWorkWithPetra.description: No ghosting. No endless waiting for replies.

whyPeopleWorkWithPetra.title: We know regional markets
whyPeopleWorkWithPetra.description: Wyoming, Powder River, Bakken, Rockies—we understand how pricing and demand actually shift here.
